questionHtml:
What is the sum of the coefficients when the following equation is balanced using the smallest whole numbers?

__C6H12O6 (aq) → __C2H5OH (aq) + __CO2 (g)

A. 4

B. 5

C. 9

D. 10

meta.title: What is the sum of the coefficients when the following equation is balanced using the smallest whole numbers? __C6H12O6 (aq) → __C2H5OH (aq) + __CO2 (g) A. 4 B. 5 C. 9 D. 10
